title: Breeze Mob Concept Mod
description: Adds The Breeze from Minecraft Live 2023
body:
By MinoBanana

The Breeze will spawn in all biomes as a hostile mob during the night. It will shoot knockback projectiles at you then fly away.


If the projectile hits you or a block, it can interact with nearby blocks including doors and trapdoors


It currently has no drops.
